basics.name: Siqi Chen
basics.summary: Undergraduate at Tsinghua University, Electronic Engineering. Research interests include AI systems, efficient attention mechanisms, and brain foundation models.

publications.name: BrainOmni: A Brain Foundation Model for Unified EEG and MEG Signals
publications.summary: Proposes the first brain foundation model that generalises across heterogeneous EEG and MEG recordings.

publications.name: PAROAttention: Pattern-Aware ReOrdering for Efficient Sparse and Quantized Attention in Visual Generation Models
publications.summary: Designs a novel pattern-aware token reordering technique that unifies diverse attention patterns into hardware-friendly block-wise patterns.

publications.name: db-SP: Accelerating Sparse Attention for Visual Generative Models with Dual-Balanced Sequence Parallelism
publications.summary: Introduces a dual-balanced workload partitioning approach for sparse attention with sequence parallelism.

portfolio.name: An Intelligent Voice Assistant
portfolio.description: Arduino + PCB + Python voice assistant for email reminders, task scheduling, and study focus. Second Award of Hardware Design Competition.

portfolio.name: FREE BBS – Tsinghua EE Student Self-Learning Platform
portfolio.description: RAG + AI architecture using GLM models, vector databases, and hybrid retrieval for personalized learning.
